mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, room_id, title, description, attendee_count, attendee_user_ids, start_time, end_time, status, cancel_reason, created_at, updated_at, deleted, version FROM t_reservation WHERE deleted = 0 AND room_id = #{roomId} AND status IN (0, 1, 2) AND NOT (end_time <= #{startTime} OR start_time >= #{endTime}) AND id <> #{excludeId}

SELECT r.id AS roomId, r.name AS roomName, COALESCE(SUM(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, res.start_time, res.end_time)), 0) AS totalMinutes, COUNT(res.id) AS reservationCount FROM t_room r LEFT JOIN t_reservation res ON res.room_id = r.id AND res.deleted = 0 AND res.status IN (1, 2, 3) AND res.start_time >= #{startDate} AND res.start_time < #{endDate} WHERE r.deleted = 0 GROUP BY r.id, r.name ORDER BY totalMinutes DESC

SELECT HOUR(start_time) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM t_reservation WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (1, 2, 3) AND start_time >= #{startDate} AND start_time < #{endDate} GROUP BY HOUR(start_time) ORDER BY hour
